title: On tending sprouts: empowering emerging immunologists in Latin America.
author_string: Brunck, Marion E G, Lamberti, Maria Julia, Hahn, Anne M
abstract: Supporting emerging immunologists in Latin America and the Caribbean (LAC) is crucial amidst fragile funding and policy shifts in the region. Their growth can deliver region-specific health solutions, foster pandemic preparedness, and advance neglected tropical disease research, paying it forward to reduce health inequities and drive global scientific progress.
